Gemini in Google Workspace: The Ultimate AI Productivity Guide

Discover how the new Gemini integration transforms Google Workspace into a seamless AI co-worker that reads your Drive and Gmail. Learn to automate complex tasks in Docs, Sheets, and Slides to save hours of manual work every week.

00:00 - Intro: The Gemini Workspace Upgrade
01:21 - Google Docs: Context-Aware Writing
02:57 - Google Sheets: Building Expert Dashboards
04:30 - Google Drive: Smart Contextual Search
05:09 - Gmail: Context-Aware Email Drafting
07:06 - Real-World Workflow: Docs to Slides
08:23 - How to Access Gemini in Workspace
